assessment.note: Low energy due to personal issues at home is a strong negative wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Late arrival reasons
new_queue.name: What's been causing your late arrivals to work recently?
new_queue.description: Explores the underlying reasons behind late arrivals, which could be linked to energy, routine, or external factors.

new_queue.label: Workload assessment
new_queue.name: How manageable does your current workload feel day-to-day?
new_queue.description: Assesses if the workload is a contributing factor to stress or lateness.

new_queue.label: Manager support needs
new_queue.name: What specific support would make a difference for you right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies any specific support needed from the manager to address current issues or improve performance.

new_queue.label: Feedback received
new_queue.name: What feedback have you received recently that’s stuck with you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces any impactful feedback that might be affecting current mood or performance.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What area of your role are you looking to grow or stretch in next?
new_queue.description: Pinpoints areas where the individual feels they can stretch and grow, revealing engagement and growth opportunities.
